title: Email Preview Pane

posts.author: The_og (Oscar Powell)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there a way to have an automation/integration open the Emails & Activities tab to a template email? Or some way to have a templated email open? Very simply, I would like users to be able to click a button and have an email open with the subject, body, and recipient, and allow them to make a few edits before opening. Thank you!
